close_notes:
Issue Summary: Observed service-error-vm_with_same_interface_and_mac_exists issue in fabcon, indicating a problem with a virtual machine having the same interface name or MAC address.
SME Findings: The issue is related to a stale port entry that needs to be mitigated. The SME has run scripts to verify and mitigate the issue, including vm_stale_port_validation_mitigation.py.
Reason of Escalation: The issue was escalated due to the impact on the Virtual Private Cloud service, specifically the "is-vpc" component.
Resolution Steps:
Initialize Mzone.
Run python3 vm_stale_port_validation_mitigation.py to verify if there is a stale entry.
If a stale entry is found, run the script again to mitigate the issue.
Re-validate after mitigation.
Signature of Issue: The issue is characterized by the error message "VM with same interfaceName or MAC already exists" and is related to a specific port ID (UUID{7472d260-d7df-4c4e-8e1f-4d8931c3de3f[tr ` LN M 1 ?]}).
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: No specific tickets are mentioned in the provided data.
Category/Subcategory: The category is Infrastructure Services, and the subcategory is Virtual Private Cloud.
Timeline Summary: The incident was created on December 8, 2025, at 12:35:11 UTC, and the last update was at 16:20:40 UTC.
Resolution Runbook: The resolution runbook is available at https://w3.ibm.com/services/lighthouse/wikis/view/a18a9d34-1b59-405b-b480-c973100f188d/2f54860c-6784-47cb-96f0-171546db34b7.
Caused by Change/Incident: The incident was caused by a parent incident (INC10503924) and is related to a change in the fabcon configuration.
Warroom: No war room information is provided.
Meeting URL: No meeting URL is provided.
Outage Start: The outage start time is December 8, 2025, at 00:00:00 UTC.
Outage End: The outage end time is not specified in the provided data.
current_status_next_steps:
Steps :

# Initialize Mzone 

# cd ~/repos/platform-inventory/scripts/sdn/

Verify if there is stale entry :
# python3 vm_stale_port_validation_mitigation.py -z mzone5c7 --port 7472d260-d7df-4c4e-8e1f-4d8931c3de3f --rnode mon3-qz1-sr3-rk168-s10-sn2 -v

If it shows stale run
# python3 vm_stale_port_validation_mitigation.py -z mzone5c7 --port 7472d260-d7df-4c4e-8e1f-4d8931c3de3f --rnode mon3-qz1-sr3-rk168-s10-sn2

Re-validate after mitigation:
# python3 vm_stale_port_validation_mitigation.py -z mzone5c7 --port 7472d260-d7df-4c4e-8e1f-4d8931c3de3f --rnode mon3-qz1-sr3-rk168-s10-sn2 -v
